title: Oorn Tchis

'''Oorn Tchis''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was a small, [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited rural world best known for exporting colorful fabrics and a rare ore used in guidance system design.<ref name="XW" /><ref name="CE" />

On the eve of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the entire [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], bringing with it the planets [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] and Oorn Tchis, as well as the [[Mirgoshir hyperspace crossroads]].<ref name="NC" /> With the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the sector submitted to the new government. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] sent his [[Kitha Farlander|sister]] to Oorn Tchis to live with relatives after their family lost their home on Agamar.<ref name="XW" />
